title: Using AI in Your Day-to-Day | Exploring AI Models: The Future of Machine Learning- Part 3 | Horizons
fulltitle: Using AI in Your Day-to-Day | Exploring AI Models: The Future of Machine Learning- Part 3 | Horizons
description:
AI isn’t just for automation—it can be a personal assistant, a creative partner or even a life coach. From streamlining business decisions to supporting personal growth, generative AI tools are transforming the way we work, think and problem-solve.

In this episode of Horizons, tech artist Kris Krüg shares how he uses AI in everyday life, from building a personal AI-powered journaling system for mental wellness to creating an AI advisory board that helps him make smarter business decisions.

With AI’s ability to synthesize insights, analyze patterns and provide real-time feedback, we are entering a future where custom AI tools can enhance everything from career planning to creative ideation. But what does that mean for how we think, create and make decisions?

Join us for a deep dive into AI-powered productivity where we explore:

How AI helps streamline your personal and professional life.
The role AI plays in mental wellness and self-improvement.
How custom AI tools act as a second brain for decision-making.

Watch all videos: https://horizons.compassdatacenters.com/series/exploring-ai-models-the-future-of-machine-learning
#Horizons #FutureOfWork #GenerativeAI @van_ai
